entry.title: Re: how to know open posting period by CDS view or API
entry.content:
Hello Lina01,

No, there are no CDSviews of APIs available..
Posting periods in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition can only be opened or closed using the Manage Posting Periods app. No API or CDS view exists to perform this operation programmatically.
The system does not have a the posting‑period management logic (OB52 equivalent) through a published API.
Best regards,
Vanessa

entry.title: Looking to boost your public‑sector skills with next‑gen SAP tools?
entry.content:
If you’re in public sector, education, finance, or SAP consulting, this one is BIG.
There’s a brand‑new course built to help you master it from the ground up: 
👉Implementing Grants Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition – Public Sector & Higher Education

This course gives you the skills to configure and manage the full grants lifecycle. It’s not just theory — it’s practical, hands‑on knowledge that changes how organizations deliver impact.
You will learn to

  • Describe SAP Grants Management functionality
  • Grasp how SAP Grants Management helps grantee organizations to manage the complete lifecycle of a grant and requirements set by the sponsor
  • Explain grant account assignment integration

Perfect for learners who want to:

✔ Work in public sector or higher‑education SAP roles
✔ Strengthen their S/4HANA Cloud expertise
✔ Understand grants from a financial + compliance angle
✔ Boost their consulting or functional career path
✔ Deepen their role in public administration digitalization

🔗Start exploring the course  👉 here

entry.title: Re: AVC Procedure Dependency Error When Referencing Variant Table in CU01
entry.content: Hi, we have same business requirement. Can someone share some insights?

entry.title: Accessing Your Financial Data: G/L Account Line Items API
entry.content:
If you're working with SAP's Finance module, the G/L Account Line Items - Read (A2X) API offers a straightforward way to retrieve journal entry information. This service pulls data from the universal journal, giving you access to key accounting fields alongside cost accounting objects.

What You Can Retrieve

The API allows you to access balances across multiple areas including General Ledger Accounting, Asset Accounting, Management Accounting, Margin Analysis, and Material Ledger. You can pull three types of balances:

  • Opening balances show totals from the fiscal year start date up to your selected date, including balance carryforward.
  • Moving balances capture all line items posted within a specific time interval, excluding carried-forward balances—useful for analyzing quarterly movements or custom time periods.
  • Ending balances combine opening balances with changes (credits and debits) within your selected timeframe.

Important Limitations

This API isn't designed for full data extraction. The universal journal contains enormous data volumes, so the service exposes only a subset of fields. We recommend using aggregation and applying strong filters to your requests.

If you need line-item level detail, include the following key fields, for example,

  • AccountingDocument,

  • CompanyCode,

  • FiscalYear,

  • Ledger,

  • LedgerGLLineItem, (ACDOCA line item number)

  • SourceLedger,

Note that AccountingDocumentItem (ACDOCA-BUZEI) is only used for associations to BSEG views.

The API also cannot retrieve cumulative ending balances.

You'll find this service on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub, where you can explore example requests and additional documentation to help you get started with your financial data queries. The image shows the API on the SAP Business Accelerator Hub:

More information

Here's where you find additional useful information:

G/L Account Line Items - Read (A2X)

Communication Management

 APIs in Finance

APIs for General Ledger Accounting

entry.title: Re: Issues in THR81 system based accessment (Successfacto...
entry.content:
Hi @PeterLang ,

I'm sorry to hear that you encountered technical issues during the exam. 

Just to give you a heads-up, the support team cannot tell you which tasks you failed as per policy. 

There is a future enhancement to the system-based exam that will show how well you scored on a topic, for example, Configuring Foundation Objects; however, we don't yet know when that will be released. 

Congratulations on passing the exam!

entry.title: Custom Container issue
entry.content:
I have created an ALV report which has 3 more ALVs as popups when double clicked on each when displayed, I have used SALV Factory and Custom Container for all the ALVs, and displaying the popups by passing the container objects to factory method of SALV, now for the very first popup which is after the standard ALV screen works fine when I close the popup and select new record, but when I double click on a pop it open a new alv popup and displays values, but when I close this popup and try to select new record from previous popup it still displays the old records. In debug mode I can see the internal table passed to factory method for these pop double clicks fetches correct data each time, but displays the records displayed the very first time

Can somebody help me with this as I have tried refreshing

entry.title: Transfer event to be used for transferring the data from material determination to settlement doc it
entry.content:
Hi @Lakshmipathi 

We have a requirement to include EAN No. (18 Char) number against each line item in the settlement document. This EAN number comes from material determination setup.

1. Do we have any standard field where we can store this EAN no. so that we can use this EAN no. for report purpose and other purpose. I have seen a field supplier material number at item level (shown in the attached screenshot) can we use this field, i have tried to put some number in the field in manual rebate process to show you but we are using only automatic settlement only (WB2R_SC). Or do we have any other field we have to store this EAN number.

2. Also, Could you please share the transfer event to be used for transferring the data from material determination/Material master to settlement document item level in the transfer manager.

 

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: Work Experience Card in the Latest People Profile is not available to add to Talent Card
entry.content:
We have been setting up the latest people profile and have been looking at the auto population of the 'internal' work history into the Work Experience card that is in the spotlight area.  

We currently have manual portlets in our talent category where the individual can enter in their internal and external work experience.  These portlets we have configured to show up in the succession and presentation talent cards.  But if we move to the new work experience card, I am not seeing a way to pull this card into the Talent Card, which is probably because the new Work Experience is an MDF object and MDF objects cannot be pulled into the Talent Card.  Is there a way to make mdf objects available in the Talent Card?

Also, in setting up the business rule for capturing internal job movement, we have found that some of our job moves (mostly with re-org processes) we have use an event reason of 'other data change', which is kind of messy with the business rule, and we kind of feel that maintaining this business rule going forward might be an issue due to how event reasons might be used.....is there any other way to populate these to the work experience portlet without using the business rule?

entry.title: /UI2/FLPAM – Unable to Add Multiple Tiles to URL-Based App Descriptor Item
entry.content:
I’m working in /UI2/FLPAM – Launchpad App Manager, in a custom technical catalog.
I created a custom App Descriptor Item of type URL App with a valid target mapping and parameters.

Problem

I am able to add only one tile under the Tiles tab.
When I attempt to add a second tile, the menu entry,

is greyed out, even though:

  • I am in Edit mode
  • This is a custom technical catalog (not SAP-delivered)
  • The App Descriptor Item is custom
  • Parameters and target mapping are valid
  • No errors appear

This issue occurs not-only for URL-based apps.
(Transactional app type shows identical behavior.)

The documentation specifies we can add multiple tiles: Maintaining Tiles  

 Is this an expected behaviour ? and Thanks for the help !!!

Over and out !

entry.title: Financial Statement Version for Profit & Loss – EBITDA Format in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are currently implementing SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud (Release 2023) and need to configure a Profit & Loss report in EBITDA format using Financial Statement Version (FSV).

I am new to SAP S/4HANA and have already reviewed the available SAP Help documentation and notes, but I would appreciate guidance from experts on the best approach to structure the FSV for EBITDA reporting.

I will also attach a sample P&L EBITDA format with below image with dummy data for reference that we need to replicate in the system.

Could someone please guide on the recommended FSV format or share any relevant notes or examples?

Gross Profit and Operating Profit are calculated figures – how can these be replicated or configured in FSV?

Also Balance Sheet Report version – Period Profit is a calculated figure – how can this be represented in FSV?

Thank you for your support.

 

Regards,

silambarasan R

entry.title: BAPI <> API
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

I have a scenario to Raise a MM Purchase Order from S4 and to send that into SAP ECC as Sales Order with an ATP Check and to send that response back to S4 to update the MM PO with the response of the ATP Check.

Do you know of such a scenario via integration suite and I'm thinking the possibility of mixing BAPI and API in iflow because ECC can only handle the BAPI and S4 would prefer API.

If you have any use cases of good blogs on such cases I would like to read on how it was done, or any recommendations.

Nuestro Core en SAP es el modulo de Grants y quisieramos explorar un poco más sobre lo que tenemos actualmente y lo necesario para poder migrar a HANA. Dentro de esta exploración quisieramos contactar a un experto en este modulo, así que si tienes la posibilidad de indicarme donde podría validar una lista de personas expertas en el modulo de Grants para poder contactarles, te lo agradecería.

Saludos cordiales, 

Julio Solís

entry.title: Re: S4 BRF+ user not receiving email
entry.content:
Hello,

An answer was provided for this question:

You seem to have chosen the wrong tag (Public Cloud) while posting your question.

BRR+ OPD setup in that form SU01, SOST and tables like APOC_D_ITEM _E in your context are on the private cloud/onpremise.

PO email output troubleshooting is done through Output Parameter Determination app in public cloud, especially the Email Recipient determination step for PO, because recipient determination can be dependent on purchasing org, group, company code, etc.

Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Custom verification logic for RF transaction in Publi...
entry.content:
Hello,

An answer was provided for this question:

I assume you were asking RF logic transaction "05 Internal Processes -> 02 Adhoc WT Creation -> 01 Replenishment for Fixed Bin". Cloud WM didn't provide replenishment for inbound on RF devices. If it's "Replenishment for Fixed Bin" you were asking, it doesn't provide supplier on screen but it provides product for input/scan. No standard functionality to support your requirement. 

Maybe you may try to enhance the transaction by "PERSONAS" . By PERSONAS , it's allowed to customize local logic via JAVA script. Search and find valid API for supplier and then call this suitable API in your enhanced script program (Detail please refer to the SAP provided guide book for personas).  For example you input a barcode string including supplier product quantity in the input box of product on RF screen , the barcode string could be handled and checked first in your enhanced PERSONAS script. Script re-set the input box value by valid product number finally. The correct product number will be transport to SAP standard program. 

Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Week 2 : Use Joule Chat to create ABAP RAP Application and explore the Explain feature
entry.content: Week 2 assignment:

entry.title: Re: eDocument SII – Canceled invoice before submission do...
entry.content:
Hello,

Here's the response that our internal chatbot provides:

When working with the eDocument process for SII in Spain, the behavior you are experiencing is indeed standard SAP behavior. Spain - Processing eDocuments for Electronic Tax Register Books in Contract Accounting Here is a breakdown of the situation:

  1. Cancellation Before Submission: If you cancel a customer invoice before submitting it to the SII, the system generates an eDocument with the status ‘canceled’. This is because the original invoice was never transmitted to the SII.

  2. No ‘Accepted’ Status for Original Invoice: The system does not generate an eDocument with the status ‘accepted’ for the original invoice if it was canceled before submission. This is standard behavior as the invoice was never part of the submission process.

  3. Configuration or SAP Note: Currently, there is no configuration or SAP Note that allows the system to generate an ‘accepted’ eDocument for an invoice that was canceled before submission.

  4. Generating XML Files: It is not possible to generate XML files for both the original and canceled invoices if the original invoice was never sent to the SII. The XML generation is tied to the submission process.

Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Week 2 : Use Joule Chat to create ABAP RAP Application and explore the Explain feature

entry.title: Handling large file transfers (1GB+) in BTP-Integration Suite !
entry.content:
We are currently evaluating the migration of high-volume 'File-to-File' pass-through scenarios (exceeding 1GB) from SAP PI/PO to SAP BTP Integration Suite. While this is currently stable in our legacy environment, we need to ensure the Cloud Integration architecture can handle similar loads without memory bottlenecks.
when we try the same requirement in CPI ,it’s getting failed to read the file .

Any recommendations would be appreciated,thank you

-regards ,Bhaskar

Cloud Integration

entry.title: Re: Custom logic for Payment media file
entry.content:
Hello,

This question has been answered.

You seem to have chosen the wrong tag (Public Cloud) while posting your question.

The scenario you described is a classic payment medium exit logic (a Private Cloud/On-prem solution), which is not the supported extensibility approach in Public Cloud.

If your goal is still to “split a 60 char value into 35 + 25 in the payment file”, the public cloud offers options such as:

  • Payment format configuration (no ABAP),
  • Use a second output field that the bank format supports and,
  • Adjust the upstream data model (where you maintain the supplier or customer address in two street lines so you do not need runtime splitting).

Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: SAP TRM Daily Compounding Interest Calculation
entry.content:
Hello,

Here's the response that our internal chatbot provides:

To achieve daily compounding interest in SAP Treasury and Risk Management (TRM) similar to your Excel model, you need to ensure that the interest calculation method includes previously accrued interest in the base for each day’s calculation. Here are some steps and considerations:

  1. Interest Calculation Method:

    • Use the ‘Exponential Interest Calculation’ method, which allows for compounding by including previously accrued interest in the calculation base. This method is suitable for scenarios where interest compounds daily.

  2. Configuration Steps:

    • Navigate to the interest condition details in SAP TRM.
    • Select ‘Exponential Interest Calculation with Factors’ Treasury and Risk Management - Interest Calculation Types to ensure that the interest calculation includes the previous day’s accrued interest.
    • Ensure that the interest calculation method is set to ‘act/360’ or ‘act/365’, which supports daily compounding.

  3. Interest Calculation Types:

    • The system should be configured to use the compound interest calculation formula, which calculates interest based on the sum of the principal and previously accrued interest.

  4. Verification:

    • After configuring, verify the cash flow in the SAP system to ensure that each day’s interest is calculated on the cumulative balance, including accrued interest.

  5. Additional Tips:

    • Ensure that the interest rate adjustment settings are configured to update daily.
    • Check the rounding settings to ensure precision in interest calculations.

Unfortunately, specific configuration steps or screenshots are not available in the provided context, but these general guidelines should help you align SAP TRM with your Excel model for daily compounding interest.

For more information, see Treasury and Risk Management - Interest Calculation Types.

Kind regards, 

Henrike

entry.title: Re: asset history sheet
entry.content:
Hello,

This question has been answered:

the Axis properties have no influence on the Asset Selection.

The scenario you want to achieve for deactivated assets is documented in SAP Product Assistance: Asset History Sheet

You have to define a filter on AssetDeactivationDate. An example with a video tutorial how to define the filter is available in this help documentation.

Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Integration Suite, enhanced edition
entry.content: How about the customers who are in CPEA  ? How will they be able to use these features .

entry.title: Re: Proactive Cross Plant Planning in S/4HANA Cloud Publi...
entry.content:
Hello,

Here's the response that our internal chatbot provides:

To address the error encountered when creating a maintenance item, it is important to ensure that the configuration and master data are correctly aligned. Here are the steps to resolve the issue:

  1. Verify Configuration: 3108513 - CR091 error when inputting activity type into Work Center

    • Ensure that the planning plant and work center plant are correctly configured in the system. The planning plant should be set to the centralized plant for proactive maintenance activities, while the work center plant should match the plant performing the tasks for reactive maintenance.

  2. Master Data Maintenance: 3033193 - Error ‘Maintain plant & for the sales area’ when creating an intercompany sales order

    • Check the master data for the technical object to ensure that the planning plant and work center plant are correctly maintained. If the planning plant is set to 1001, ensure that the work center plant is also set to 1003 for proactive maintenance activities.

  3. Automatic Data Fetching:

    • If the system is not automatically fetching the correct work center plant based on the planning plant, it may be necessary to review the configuration settings related to plant assignments and ensure they are correctly set up.

  4. Manual Adjustment:

    • As a temporary workaround, manually adjust the main work center plant to 1003 when creating the maintenance item if the automatic fetching does not work.

For more information, see :

3108513 - CR091 error when inputting activity type into Work Center

3033193 - Error 'Maintain plant & for the sales area' when creating an intercompany sales order

Kind regards, Henrike

entry.title: Re: 🇧🇷 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core (Belo Horizonte, Brazil)
entry.content: Vai ser legal Davi, bora se conectar por lá! Grande abraço!!

entry.title: SAP ALM Experience Day -Masterclass Edition! : Bellevue, WA
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

We’re excited to invite you to our in-person ALM Experience Day – Masterclass Edition, taking place in Bellevue, Washington, on March 24, 2026.

This full‑day event is designed to provide valuable insights and hands‑on experience in managing operations and implementations with SAP Cloud ALM, helping you accelerate business transformation and operational efficiency.

Why attend?

Gain firsthand exposure to the latest advancements in SAP Cloud ALM for both implementation and operations. You will have the opportunity to earn the Solution Transformation Practitioner Badge by completing the assessment, while connecting with SAP experts and peers to exchange insights, trends, and best practices.

Event Highlights:

  • Understand the importance of a robust ALM strategy to drive business growth and agility.
  • Gain in‑depth knowledge of SAP Cloud ALM and its role in supporting intelligent cloud and hybrid landscapes.
  • Participate in hands-on sessions for implementation and operations
  • Engage in interactive sessions with SAP ALM experts and network with industry peers.
  • Discover how to seamlessly transition to SAP Cloud ALM, the go-to platform for all your Application Lifecycle Management needs as an SAP customer.
  • Enhance your expertise by completing the Solution Transformation Practitioner Badge test, demonstrating your ability to manage the design‑to‑deploy phase of business transformation using an Integrated Toolchain.

Event Details:

  • Date: March 24th, 2026
  • Venue: 601 108th Ave NE, Suite 1000, Bellevue, WA 98004, USA
  • Time: 10:00 a.m. - 4:00 p.m. (PST)

Registration is free, but subject to approval!

Register now : https://events.sap.com/sap-alm-events-na/en_us/home.html

entry.title: Re: Introducing SAP Integration Suite, enhanced edition
entry.content:
Enhanced edition has been generally released and is available via BTPEA/ CPEA for those customers who leverage that model as well.

Premium customers to not need to move, they can remain with their current license.

Enhanced edition is in single tenants with the 500k messages, so yes, a different price point than premium edition.

There will be additional features added which can be tracked in the roadmap

entry.title: Re: Rescheduling of maintenance orders after breakdown

entry.title: Return from the structure of CSKB
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm not sure what is right or wrong here.

I open a CSKB structure and branch to a fixed parts list below it. Now I want to display or change it with a right mouse click. If I jump back from this screen (with the green arrow), I don't jump back one step, but return to the initial screen.

Is this correct? Is this the case for others as well? I always thought that I would at least jump back to the open structure.

 BR Uli

entry.title: Finance & Legal: Duplicate Invoices
entry.content:
We got two invoices for the same issue. The older one disappeared from the SAP for Me site, but we did not get a cancellation for that. How shall we proceed? I contacted our AE, but did not get an answer. 


--- Support Assistant ---
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Other
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: None of these

Q: What is the problem?
A: Nothing with the system itself.

--- Issue Date (UTC) ---
DIGITS-02-25 07:20:37


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Finance & Legal: Duplicate Invoices
entry.content:
Hello,

To get assistance regarding the duplicate invoice, please kindly follow KBA 3459668 - "Frequently Asked Questions about the Finance & Legal Dashboard - SAP for Me":

"3. How can I address questions about an invoice?
Use the Get Assistance functionality on the contract detail page or ask a contractual question via e-mail to sapcontractcenter@sap.com.
Also see KBA 1660069 - How to contact SAP Order Management for contract-related questions or issues."

Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP Generative AI Hub: Using the Python SDK for SAP Data Tasks (Part 2 of 6)
entry.content: SAP AI Launchpad is a separate BTP application (subscribed alongside AI Core) that provides a web-based UI for the Generative AI Hub. Within AI Launchpad, there is a built-in Jupyter-style notebook environment where you can write and run Python code directly in the browser — no local Python installation needed. The key advantage is that your AI Core credentials are pre-injected into the notebook environment automatically, so you skip the ".aicore-config.json" setup entirely. It's the fastest way to run your first Python SDK call without any local configuration. If you're already using AI Launchpad to access the prompt editor, look for the Notebooks section in the left navigation.

entry.title: Re: SUM - DMO with SYSTEM Move : Export file transfer Spe...
entry.content: Hi qwertie, thank you. I will check this

entry.title: Re: Handling large file transfers (1GB+) in BTP-Integration Suite !
entry.content: May want to consider trying out edge integration cell where you can control the runtime, but processing 1GB+ files on the regular should also raise some eyebrows.

However we are getting an error in step 8.2 Get Bearer Token.
We are getting this error:

We tried disabling the SSL verification in the preferences and in this case we get this other error (401):

We checked also the tenant settings for OpenID Connect like mentioned in the common issues, but looks correct.
Any clue?
Thanks
Marco

entry.title: Re: Indeed’s Transition Away from XML Feeds: What SAP SuccessFactors Customers Need to Know
entry.content:
Hi All,
Did you have to submit a ticket to SuccessFactors Service team, and if yes, what information did you provide on the ticket? We reached out to our SuccessFactors AE, and she advised submitting a ticket. 
I will appreciate your guidance. 

Thank you,
Christiana

entry.title: How to create WTs in EWM without a batch?
entry.content:
Hello,

We work with a Storage Type that stores multiple batches in the same storage bin.

When creating the picking WTs, system determines a specific batch to be created.
However, in this multi batch ST, warehouse workers would take the lot that is closest to them, to avoid downtime from having to move all the pallets to look for a particular lot that is filled in the WT.

So, how can we create picking WTs without a predetermined batch?

If you can make a recommendation to improve this in operation, it is also welcome.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to create WTs in EWM without a batch?
entry.content:
Hello,
What you describe can be achieved by changing the given Storage Type customizing in regards to Level of Avail. Qty and Avail. Qty: Batches.
Set it to '1' (storage bin level) and '1' (batch-neutral), respectively.
This way the available stock entries in /SCWM/AQUA will be stored altogether as one stock line only with the full quantity of a given product.
For example, physical stocks of product XYZ have 10 PC of Batch A, 10 PC of Batch B and 10 PC of batch C, in three separate HUs, named 1, 2 and 3.
With Level of Available quantity set to blank (HU) and Avail. Qty: Batches also blank (Batch-specific), your available stocks would be exactly the same as the physical stock entries:
10 PC of product XYZ batch A in HU 1
10 PC of product XYZ batch B in HU 2
10 PC of product XYZ batch C in HU 3
However, with the changes mentioned above the available stocks are stored as: 30 PC of product XYZ. No batch information. No HU information.
You will fill in which HU and which batch is being picked upon WT confirmation in /SCWM/TO_CONF or RFUI.
Doing so you ensure that a source HU and a batch are not predefined in the WT, assuming that:
The outbound delivery does not contain a batch selection criteria.
That no stock lines on the bin have Quality Inspection (QI) reference.
As outlined on KBA 2429679 - Product WT includes source HU despite Storage Type customizing.
Please also refer to restrictions mentioned on KBAs:
2608906 - WT created with batch for Batch-Neutral Storage Type
2463481 - Batch Neutral setting does not work during WT creation
Before making any changes to your Storage Type customizing, please refer to KBA 3483206 - Changes in the Storage Type customizing in SPRO
Best regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Ariba: How to stop carbon copy invoice sent to Ariba from CIG

How to stop the flow of invoice getting created in Ariba?

Ariba Invoice screen:

I have checked the document routing by changing to "Ariba" and "CIG" but no effect.

CIG Transaction tracker:

entry.content:
Hi Watcharin_Boonrueng,

I have checked the raised question and I would like to clarify the technical background: Are you using SAP API Management capability where you developed an API Proxy that you call you are getting in its response the error: "APIProxy revision xx of xxxx_v1 does not exist in environment test organization xxxx"?

Thank you for the clarification,
David

entry.title: Envio de e-mail para mais de um destinatário
entry.content:
Boa tarde!

Na empresa na qual trabalho, não possuía o processo de envio de e-mail automático para pedido de compra, realizei a configuração está funcionando perfeitamente, mais o envio é realizado somente para um único destinatário, no qual o SAP busca o e-mail na XK02 (cadastro fornecedor), tenho a necessidade que este e-mail seja enviado para mais de um destinatário, gostaria de saber se existe algo que possa ser feito para esta demanda.

Atendiosamente

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Employee Central Embedded Analytics for Compensation Information
entry.content: Hi Luke - Where in Permission role permissions to view the Compa Ratio chart?

entry.title: Can all approvers be displayed correctly from the beginning when using BAdI MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2
entry.content:
I am using Workflow for Purchase Requisition with BAdI MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2 to determine approvers dynamically.

The workflow has 4 approval levels.

Example approvers:

  • Level 1 → User A

  • Level 2 → User B

  • Level 3 → User C

  • Level 4 → User D

The issue I see is that when the workflow starts (before anyone approves), the approvers are not displayed correctly for all levels.

For example, at the beginning:

  • Level 1 → correct (User A)

  • Level 2 → correct (User B)

  • Level 3 → shows an incorrect approver (sometimes same as level 1)

  • Level 4 → also incorrect

Then once the workflow progresses:

  • after level 2 is approved → level 3 becomes correct

  • after level 3 is approved → level 4 becomes correct

From tracing the BAdI, I can see that initially it is only called for:

 

 
STEPINFO-currentstep = 001
STEPINFO-currentstep = 002
and it is not called for steps 003 or 004 until the workflow actually reaches those steps.

So my question is:

Is it possible to display the correct approvers for all approval levels from the beginning, before any approval step is completed, when using BAdI MMPUR_WORKFLOW_AGENTS_V2?

entry.title: I need to extract the AIM Configuration Filter Parameters in an excel which is not available.
entry.content: I need to extract the data in order compare what application interfaces are configured in FRUN and what is not configured and need to be configured. I would like to know is there any Table where we can extract the data for each filter set for each category in AIM with drill out filter parameters like IFLOW names configured.

Best regards,
Parag

entry.title: FUE License Consumption Ruleset
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I am currently reviewing the SAP licensing model based on FUEs and I’ve run into an issue regarding the ruleset used to calculate FUE consumption.

According to SAP Note 3113382, the FUE measurement relies on a ruleset provided by SAP. However, the ruleset available today appears to be incomplete or outdated, as several usage scenarios and mappings seem to be missing. I haven’t found any official update or a more detailed version of the ruleset.

Does anyone have a more recent ruleset for FUE calculation or any additional documentation / information? 

Any insights, references, or experiences would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: How Musicians can Make Great Programmers | SAP Mentor Spotlight Matt Harding
entry.content: I’m a bit late here, but I’m curious how others have seen creative backgrounds shape tech careers. I’ve met quite a few people who switched from arts into programming, and many say their earlier skills helped them pick up patterns and problem‑solving faster. If anyone who made a similar jump is still around, how did you blend both sides in your daily work?

entry.title: Re: API Management - GET mTLS Serial Number
entry.content:
Hi @Pratola_Gianni ,

You have found the perfect knowledge source for your scenario, as it is mentioned in the SAP Blog: How to Read Client Certificate Details in an API Proxy in SAP API Management first you need to set the 2 mentioned properties:
- <ConnectionProperties>
- <ClientProperties>
to 'true'.
This action can be done only by Operations Team of API Management. Please create a support case for the component OPU-API-OD-OPS with that request and please also mention the URL of your API Portal where you configured that virtual host with mTLS.

Once it is completed you are allowed to read the serial number of the client certificate via 'tls.client.cert.serial' variable.

Thank you,
David

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Work Zone: Tile Opens(content federation) but App is opening blank in Mobile
entry.content: @Vera_Gutbrod Kindly help

entry.title: Re: ASP.NET Crystal Report Viewer failing to display a re...
entry.content:
Without a support contract you can't submit an Incident, you would have to purchase CR Server which comes with a 1 year contract, last I heard...

So you are using JS/HTML tags in your data?

Can you use dummy data and send me a direct message with a link to download the report with saved data for testing and possibly sending to R&D to look at?

A quick search I found this description of what is happening:

The expression
<A>C</A> in JavaScript is interpreted as a string literal because it is enclosed in double quotes, resulting in a string value that includes the HTML-like tags. 
When the JavaScript interpreter encounters " <A>C</A>", it treats the enclosed characters literally as a sequence of characters within a string. This string value itself does not have any special meaning or function within the core JavaScript language, other than representing the text itself. 
  • String representation: The expression evaluates to the exact string " <A>C</A>".
  • No HTML interpretation (in JavaScript): JavaScript is a scripting language, while HTML is a markup language. The string is not automatically parsed or rendered as HTML in a standard JavaScript environment (e.g., a console or backend environment like Node.js).
  • Potential use in the DOM: This string is most commonly used when interacting with the Document Object Model (DOM) to represent an HTML element. For example, it could be used to set the innerHTML property of an existing element:
    javascript
    // Example usage in a web browser environmentdocument.getElementById('myElement').innerHTML = " <A>C</A>";
    In this context, the browser's rendering engine would interpret the string as HTML, creating an anchor element (<a>) with the content "C" inside it. 
The value itself is a simple string, and its behavior or appearance depends entirely on how the JavaScript code uses it. 
 

I can ask R&D to have look at this post but I doubt they will do anything to resolve your issue.

I suggest not using that format in your data.

Don

PS- The reason I say R&D likely won't do anything is somehting like this has the potential to cause 1000's of existing reports not to work. CR uses js files to manage a lot of data particularly Parameters now use HTML5 to process them.

entry.title: Re: Week 2 : Use Joule Chat to create ABAP RAP Application and explore the Explain feature

entry.title: Re: Unable to Activate API Management in SAP Integration...
entry.content:
Hi @ravkish ,

I can confirm that SAP API Management is supported on SAP BTP Trial, specifically in the multi-cloud (Cloud Foundry) trial landscape.

What you experienced is not a limitation of trial accounts, it was more likely a temporary service issue.

Have you been able to activate the capability since creating your post?

Thank you,
David

entry.title: Re: DG Exceptions in ECC
entry.content:
Hello

please answer these questions:

a.) do you use 3E content?

b.) Do you use GLM WWI reports? and print DG exemptions there?

c.) Please check help.sap.com ; there is an example for chapter 14 logic (for Safety Data Sheet)

But yes you are right: DG exemptions are normally ignored in chapter 14; but not ignored in GLM part (label content)

So yes: SAP is delivering something; but more related to Label content

Hope this helps

C.B.

entry.title: Re: Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide - 1
entry.content:
Hello @MarcoDebattisti ,

I faced a similar issue earlier, which was caused by an expired client certificate. After generating a new certificate and placing it in the folder specified in the Bruno Collection configuration, the issue was resolved.

This problem is likely due to the client certificate being expired or not configured correctly in Bruno → Collection Settings → Client Certificates. Please verify that the client certificate is valid and that it has been placed in the correct folder path as mentioned in the Bruno Collection settings.

Thanks,
Indrajeet

entry.title: Re: KSEF 2.0 Setup no drccApiUrl in BTP service binding c...
entry.content:
Hello,

Did you onboard the cloud edition before April 2023? If so, that might be the reason why you don't see the drccApiUrl field. I suggest you check the Did You Set Up Your Cloud Edition Before April 26, 2023? Your Attention Is Needed! blog post. 

Please, let me know if that helps.

Best regards, Aleshane

entry.title: Re: Table ARFCRSTATE line 0 out of range: table is empty...
entry.content:
You may check the SAP notes (*) or contact SAP Support.

(*) NB: I found no SAP note matching your error message.

entry.title: Error with Identity Provisioning Tab in Work Zone, advanced edition
entry.content:
I have set up SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition and it is working fine, and I even provisioned users and I am the admin.

But when I open site settings for it, under the Identity Provisioning tab, I see an error and the retry button is disabled.

WHat does this mean? How do I fix it?

entry.title: Re: Claude Code via MCP: Poor man's Joule, or a practical tool?
entry.content:
Day 6, an evening session

We need to talk about Codex.

Because wow, this thing can plan!

Wise people have been saying, switch the Model into a Plan mode first. Ask it to analyse the codebase, make a plan. Revise, then execute.

Naturally, I paid them no heed. I would always jump directly into execution — with mixed results, reworks, and manual fixes.

Not today. Today I put Codex into Plan mode. Why today? Mostly just to try something new. Why Codex? Because I hear he is especially adept at planning and architecting. And man, can he draw up a plan!

I decided to stay with Fiori web apps for now, because I’d like to get to a state where I can specify one and AI will create it end-to-end. It may still take a while, if I manage to get there at all. 

For today I chose NorthWind Traders: Extended version. The simplified version didn’t quite work out, then it follows that the more complicated one will, right? A grandes problemas grandes remedios, as they say in Spain.

In lieu of Specification I directed Codex to the Database Schema at GitHub. After 1 minute and 26 seconds he came back with a summary approach, a 16-point plan, and 6 recommended delivery phases.

Honestly, I was blown away by this. It’s too much text to paste here, here is a link to a Gist. It contains the entirety of today’s conversation, the Plan I am referring to is lines 41-133.

Then I continued instructing my new best friend Codex to construct the RAP artifacts - or rather just kept responding “Yes please” to his suggestions, correcting the course only slightly from time to time. I won’t bore you with details (it’s all in the Gist), just wanted to point out a few observations:

  • Codex was able to detect that this Database Table was denormalised:

This impressed me much. So he’s got the brains and he’s got the touch?

At first he created the table as defined in the defective Schema, but kept reminding me of this fact throughout the conversation until we fixed it.

  • He made a mistake of creating all Currency Amounts with 4 decimals. No-one complained until the Service Binding. Another obvious candidate for inclusion into a Skill! 🙄
  • I love that Codex CLI shows you the percentage of remaining context at all times. Comes in super-handy to know when to /compact.

  • Another thing I like is that it shows you the consumed tokens at the end of the conversation. Gives you an idea.

Just as a curiosity, this would have cost me about $2.55 if I had to pay for tokens. And it was just a fraction of the conversation.

 

From Vibe Coding to Agentic Engineering

Both these terms were coined by Andrej Karpathy about a year apart, and I now find myself in the need of transition between the two. Right now I’m a vibe coder. I do everything in just one context window (which gets compacted from time to time - either automatically or be me), using the most capable model, burning through tokens like mad. This is matar moscas a cañonazos, to stay with Spanish sayings - killing flies with cannonshots. I make no distinction between explorative tasks (“Read the contents of the SAP Package ZNORTH”), for which sub-Agents could be spawned using cheaper quicker Models like Haiku or GPT-5-mini, and thinking tasks where more capable Models are required. I have a vague idea how to orchestrate such a setup (define custom subagents in the project’s .claude/agents with a focused role (e.g. codebase-explorer, log-analyzer), then explicitly ask Claude to “delegate X to the Y agent”), but I am nowhere near that level yet. Hell, I don’t even know how to create and use Skills properly.

As a result, the Antigravity Agent has given up the ghost, said to himself probably This guy is an idiot.

I could throw money at it, but let’s try to do things right first. Agentic Engineering.

 

Anyways. Baby steps. I only installed Claude Code 6 days ago, after all 😅

entry.title: SAP Developer News, March 12th, 2026
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION

SAP Intelligence Event

  • Event Details: https://taiefy.com/
  • SAP CodeJams: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/gh-p/code-jam

HANA-CLI 4.0

  • NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/hana-cli
  • GitHub Repo: https://github.com/SAP-samples/hana-developer-cli-tool-example
  • Documentation Site: https://sap-samples.github.io/hana-developer-cli-tool-example/
  • Blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/artificial-intelligence-blogs-posts/major-new-version-of-the-hana-cli-how-it-was-built-with-the-help-of-ai-and/ba-p/14346752

 SAP BTP Platform Automation Roundtable #2

  • Customer & Partner Roundtable for SAP BTP Platform Automation #2 (March Edition) https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/customer-amp-partner-roundtable-for-sap-btp-platform-automation-2-march/ba-p/14339369

SAP Fiori Development Newsletter

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blog-posts-by-sap/sap-fiori-development-newsletter-issue-39-march-2026/ba-p/14334703

SAP CodeJam at Bosch-Vietnam

  • SAP CodeJams: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam/gh-p/code-jam

 SAP Developer Insights Survey

  • The 2026 SAP Developer Insights Survey is live: https://sapinsights.eu.qualtrics.com/jfe/form/SV_9prRAJk5ccYPMMe
  • 2025 Survey Report: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-sap/the-2025-developer-insights-survey-the-report/ba-p/14323198

DYK #7 AI Launchpad Model Library

  • More Info: https://help.sap.com/docs/ai-launchpad/sap-ai-launchpad/model-library

=============================================================

CHAPTER TITLES

00:00 Intro

0:10 SAP Intelligence Event

1:26 hana-cli 4.0

2:48 SAP BTP Platform Automation Roundtable #2

3:45 SAP Fiori Development Newsletter

4:36 SAP CodeJam at Bosch-Vietnam

5:50 SAP Developer Insights Survey 

6:35 DYK #7 AI Launchpad Model Library

 Transcription

00;00;00;02 - 00;00;05;01

This is the SAP Developer News for March 12th, 2026.

00;00;05;04 - 00;00;09;26

Hey, everybody, we're here at the SAP Intelligence Event and we're on the final day. We just completed

00;00;09;29 - 00;00;25;18

all the CodeJams and I'll say this event was amazing. We had great collaborations, very good conversations. The hosts very friendly. So I can recommend that to come here next year. It's going to happen and Nora want to say something

00;00;25;25 - 00;00;43;08

Yeah actually we did three different CodeJams today. So one was using Joule Studio and building agents with Joule studio and the other one was getting started with Gen AI Hub. And the one that I love most is our new CodeJam was, which is the, I got did we call it: Building Code Based Agents on BTP

00;00;43;10 - 00;01;05;06

Anyway, it's about how you can build your own AI agents and deploy them to BTP using Gen AI Hub LiteLLM and CrueAI and we actually solve the little murder mystery, so that was a lot of fun. Oh, yeah. That was the long one. Yeah. And I was here just to take selfies, and I was here just to administrate things like, you know, create the users or an email address.

00;01;05;06 - 00;01;23;07

Now, has it been a great time? Really good to hang out with the colleagues again and, meet all my friends here in Amsterdam, if you're interested in a CodeJam in your area or you going to do is request, and we'll put a link to the, so that we'll put a link to that in the show notes.

00;01;23;10 - 00;01;26;13

Bye for now.

00;01;26;16 - 00;02;00;29

Earlier this week, I released a brand new 4.0 version of the Hana command line interface. Now there's tons of new functionality in here. From everything from a brand new documentation site to, an MCP server and lots of new commands that have been implemented, performance improvements, all kinds of stuff. But how it is able to do all this new functionality in a relatively short amount of time has to do with the usage of AI coding assistance.

00;02;01;02 - 00;02;26;23

And I've recently written a little blog post that details my experience with these code assistants. What went well? What didn't go so well, and some suggestions on how to optimize usage of such code assistance. So if you're a user of Hana command line interface, which is a tool for any developers out there that use Hana or the cloud application programing model, I suggest that you check out the brand new version.

00;02;26;26 - 00;02;49;18

Or if you're just interested in what it's like to take a major project and use code assistance heavily on them, then you might, check out the blog post, even if you're not a Hana CLI user. So links to all the things I mentioned are available in the video description.

00;02;49;21 - 00;03;33;29

January this year saw the inaugural SAP BTP Platform Automation Roundtable. It's already March now and time for the second one. The topic in general covers the BTP, CLI and Terraform, which we use to create and manage our resources on SAP, BTP. The roundtable, which is open to everyone, is on Tuesday, the 24th of March at 1100 hours CET Central European Time and there will be latest updates for both tools, a Q&A section, live demos, a UX survey and more.

00;03;34;01 - 00;03;46;08

There's a link to a blog post with all the details, including how to register. See you there!

00;03;46;11 - 00;04;18;09

The latest SAP Fiori development newsletter, released this week on March 11th and is full of lots of great news. In the development updates, there's new work around filtering and search in Fiori elements for OData v4, info on the latest, the Open Source podcast and the new MDC Geo Map control in SAPUI5, just to name a few. On the event side, the newsletter points to upcoming community activities such as SAP, UX Innovation Day and new Customer Engagement initiative.

00;04;18;11 - 00;04;36;17

There's also some news on potential new AI segments coming to UI5Con, so if that interests you, be sure to check it out as the link to the event and how to register and all that good stuff. There's tons more info in the newsletter, so be sure to check it out in the link below. As always, happy coding!

00;04;36;20 - 00;05;25;13

Hello everyone. We are, Bosch office in Ho Chi Min City conducting three CodeJams.. And, we have, Rose, one of our participants with this, Rose, do you have, a few words about the CodeJams you have attended? Yes. Today is the second day of three day SAP CodeJam at Bosch Vietnam and I’m grateful to draw this year as SAP is to share valuable insight into the AI Power SAP capabilities, then unguided have us come this exercise up, building SAP AI service this this experience actually strengthen my skill and give me a clear view of SAP.

00;05;25;15 - 00;05;46;24

How SAP can turn AI Use case into a real business value and efficiency for our customer, but we are not done yet. We have one more CodeJam to go which is happening tomorrow on ABAP Cloud Restful application programing model. So stay tuned for further updates. Thank you Bye.

00;05;46;26 - 00;06;11;08

Hey everyone, I'm here with a quick reminder for our developer community. The SAP Developer Insights survey is still open and we'll love to hear from you. The survey runs through March 30th, so there's still time to share your perspective and help shape feature developer tools, technologies, and programs across the SAP ecosystem. Now, your feedback plays a big role in helping us understand how developers are working today.

00;06;11;10 - 00;06;37;12

From the tools you use to the challenges you're facing and the trends shaping the future of development. Now, if you already started the survey but didn't have time to finish it. No worries, you can pick up right where you left off and complete it. And if you haven't taken it yet, we'll love to get your feedback. You can find the link to the survey in the description below.

00;06;37;15 - 00;07;01;25

Did you know that you can use the model library in generative AI hub on SAP AI launchpad to explore DL Elms SAP s offering managed, hosted or provided remotely. You can filter these models by capability, input type, model provider, and other filter categories. This can not only help you to find the right model for your needs, but also let you try it out its capabilities straight through.

00;07;01;25 - 00;07;05;15

Opening a configurable chat interface with the model.

entry.title: Re: Enlarging the use of BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST
entry.content:
Thanks. A few remarks.

Only the parameter C_ACCIT has lines containing the components BAPI_PARAM and BAPI_TABIX, so your code READ TABLE <fs_table> WITH KEY ('BAPI_PARAM') = ... would fail (ITAB_ILLEGAL_COMPONENT) if trying to change C_ACCCR or other parameters of the method IF_EX_ACC_DOCUMENT~CHANGE of the BAdI ACC_DOCUMENT. Suggestion: it's not worth programming dynamically, it obfuscates the logic for no good reason.

The usual logic behind the EXTENSION parameter of any BAPI is to fill STRUCTURE with the name of an existing DDIC structure (usually created by the customer or the partner) and VALUEPART1 to VALUEPART4 contain the values of components of the DDIC structure (can be mapped via the methods CL_ABAP_CONTAINER_UTILITIES=>FILL_CONTAINER_C and READ_CONTAINER_C).

One screenshot is missing which can help understanding better the code, it's the components BAPI_PARAM and BAPI_TABIX of the parameter C_ACCIT of the method IF_EX_ACC_DOCUMENT~CHANGE of the BAdI ACC_DOCUMENT . NB: the screenshot is showing my own data (passed to BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST).

As a reminder, here's your code, where <fs_table> is in fact C_ACCIT:

          READ TABLE <fs_table> WITH KEY
                                  ('BAPI_PARAM') = <fs_ext>-structure
                                  ('BAPI_TABIX') = <fs_ext>-valuepart1
                                ASSIGNING <fs_header>.

The parameter EXTENSION2 of BAPI_ACC_DOCUMENT_POST needs to contain these values to change C_ACCIT-KOSTL and C_ACCHD-GLVOR (VALUEPART4 contains the values):

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Demand Driven MRP (DDMRP) Functionality
entry.content: @lingaiahvanamI am working on SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, so I cannot use the T-Code SM30 because it is not available. How can I maintain the below data? Also, please explain whether this data is mandatory for DDMRP and how it can be viewed in Public Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Status of Perform Further Valuation App Deprecation
entry.content: Hi Chris, Thanks for the information. Do you have a clear and confirmed timeline for the deprecation of the Perform Further Valuation app? I reviewed the links you shared, but I was unable to find any specific timeline details. Appreciate your guidance on this.

entry.title: Can I configure the Enable Now Manager email notifications that are sent when objects are changed?
entry.content:
Greetings Enable Now Community!

I am going to be using Workflows with my team a lot more in the coming future and we will be utilizing the email notifications built into Enable Now Manager to "communicate" when items are ready for review/publish/etc. 

Is there a way to configure those emails to look a little cleaner or at customizations to them?

Thanks!
